sections.Name:
Raymond Hastle
Aliases: 3L00-T00TH
sections.Psychological Profile: A completely unhinged but functional cyber-pyscho.
sections.Physical Description: Chromed to the gills, to the point of near full body conversion.  He is colorful, and mechanical.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
Custom Tier 3 Netrunner Suite - 6 - Iconic: “The Spam Man Cometh”, Tier 1 Ad Spam Malware costs no RAM to use. (Literally just turn on infinite ram but only when doing this, has very little practical application.  It’s just funny to do.)
Silent Step Soles - 2
Biomonitor - 1 
ICE Layer - 1
Scent Scanner -1 
Enhanced Ears - 2
Reinforced Tendons - 2
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
Cracked Netrunner
Free running/parkour expert
Skilled with firearms and blunt weaponry
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Medium Armor Jack
Militech Lexington, Iconic: “Party Popper” - Loaded with modified flachette rounds (and confetti) that turn the gun into a pocket auto shotgun. Lowers the gun’s output to a light power weapon but increases the projectile count per shot from 1 to 8.
Arasaka Nuwaki Assault Rifle
Heavily modified combat helmet that offers Medium armor protection on top of allowing image overlays, integrated gas mask, and heat/night vision.  Booby Trapped, removal of the helmet without authorization will result in the brick of C4 implanted in 3L00-T00TH’s chest cavity to detonate.  Will also detonate, if the signal from his Biomonitor flatlines.
Collapsing Baton
Clown Horn

sections.Name: Hunter Graves
sections.Psychological Profile: Suffers from (OLD) Obsessive love disorder; towards Hysteria.
sections.Physical Description: 6’1 Black and Grey and red canine exotic
sections.Chrome / Implants:
10
Arms & Arm Attachments:
Auditory System: Enhanced ears(2)
Hands & Feet: Silentstep soles (2)
Integumentary System: Sub-dermal plating (2)
Neural: Impulse Splicer (2)
Miscellaneous: ICE layer (1), Ghosttag (1)
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
Threat detection and situational awareness.
CQC: exceptionally good with closed spaces, the closer the better but main goal is to takedown and cripple to clear ways. 
Human shielding & body positioning; Often stands and puts himself between threats, will take a bullet.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Rifle, Pistol, and his correction collar.
sections.Backstory:
Born in Corpo Plaza; Hunter had lost his mother at a young age, leaving him with his father since he was about two. Developing childhood amnesia not long after, turning his memory a mess of blanks and holes until he was seventeen. His dad worked at Militech, and once Hunter was 18, on his birthday he was made to sign up. His father was fortunate enough to be put behind a desk like the worthless man he was while Hunter was assigned a grunt, a body for Militech to use and throw away when he stopped being useful or died. He lived that way for about four years, until a handful of grunt squads had been transferred over to Lazarus, a Militech tie that needed more bodies after massive casualties from an unsaid event. Most of the groups were split off, but his squad and another were brought to the CEO, “The Handler”. She was personally going through each file to find people legitimately useful, calling each person “fucking useless” until reaching Hunter. Because he had slightly better than his squad, he was fortunately or unfortunately picked by her. 
Being chosen led to him being formed as a Lazarus asset, Hysteria’s bodyguard that she personally broke and made her own. He’s still fresh, only having training as a grunt, and is being actively trained by hysteria.

sections.Name: Papa Lonbraj (Léandre Volcy)
sections.Occupation: Oungan of the Dogtown Voodoo Boys
sections.Psychological Profile:
Papa Lonbraj presents as calm, deliberate, and unnervingly patient. He is not prone to emotional outbursts, nor does he rely on intimidation through volume or spectacle. Instead, he exerts pressure through silence, timing, and inevitability. He rarely reacts in the moment. He responds later, when the outcome is already decided.
__Chrome / Implants__
Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 3) - 5 Points
Ocular System: Smart Eyes - 2 Points
Miscellaneous: ICE Layer, Ghost Tag, Biomonitor - 3 Points
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Highly skilled netrunner, spiritual and tactical leader
sections.RP Hooks: Dogtown Voodoo Boys do not breach beyond the Blackwall—not even out of curiosity. They specialize in deep-net intelligence, infrastructure control, and psychological warfare within safe limits. They treat rogue signals and anomalies as warnings.

sections.Name:
Dr. Elian Cascade
Commonly referred to as Director Cascade
sections.Occupation:
Director of The Cradle, a Lazarus recovery and intake facility.
Oversees high-risk cybernetic patient stabilization, asset intake, psychological evaluation, hostile-corporate influence removal, and controlled reintegration.
sections.Psychological Profile:
Calm, clinical, composed, and deeply controlled. Cascade presents herself as reasonable, professional, and even compassionate, but her compassion is filtered through corporate medical doctrine.

She genuinely believes Lazarus helps people who would otherwise be exploited, abandoned, killed, or left unstable by less responsible institutions. She does not view herself as a captor or abuser. She views herself as a doctor making hard decisions for patients who are too damaged, conditioned, or compromised to safely advocate for themselves.

Cascade prefers consent, but only when she believes the patient is stable enough to give it. If someone refuses treatment while she believes they are under hostile influence, trauma-loop activation, or cyberware instability, she will justify forced intervention as emergency stabilization.

Her core belief:

“Freedom without stability is just abandonment with prettier language.”

She is polite, patient, and rarely raises her voice. Her most unsettling trait is that she can admit to control, tracking, memory alteration, or containment without sounding cruel. To her, these are not punishments. They are procedures.
sections.Physical Description:
A polished, professional woman with an immaculate corporate-medical appearance. Usually dressed in tailored black, white, or muted Lazarus clinical attire. Her posture is relaxed but exact, and she rarely wastes movement.

She has a soft voice, steady eye contact, and the kind of presence that makes a room feel quieter when she enters. Her appearance is not openly intimidating; she looks more like a hospital director or corporate therapist than a combatant.
sections.Backstory:
Dr. Elian Cascade began her career in high-risk cybernetic rehabilitation, working with soldiers, corporate security personnel, failed exotic conversions, and patients whose chrome had outpaced their ability to psychologically adapt.

Early in her career, she watched unstable cybernetic patients get passed between clinics, corps, gangs, ripperdocs, and military programs. Some were exploited. Some were discarded. Some were killed when they became inconvenient. Cascade came to believe that Night City’s greatest cruelty was not control, but abandonment disguised as freedom.

Her philosophy hardened over time:

People already made into weapons do not become free just because their handlers let go of the leash.

Eventually, Lazarus recruited her for her ability to stabilize high-risk assets without destroying their usefulness. Under Circe’s Lazarus, Cascade handled recovery and compliance protocols but increasingly viewed the old regime as wasteful, chaotic, and too experimental for its own good.

After Hysteria killed Circe and took control, Cascade became one of the key loyalists who helped make Hysteria’s Lazarus functional. She now directs The Cradle, a Lazarus facility designed to intake damaged cybernetic patients, remove hostile influence, establish medical dependency, and reintroduce them as stable Lazarus-aligned personnel.

Cascade sees Hysteria’s Lazarus as a correction to Circe’s excesses. Where Circe experimented, Cascade believes she rehabilitates. Where others see brainwashing, she sees trauma-loop correction. Where others see imprisonment, she sees protective custody.

She is not lying when she says Lazarus saves people.

That is what makes her dangerous.
sections.Known Affiliations:
Lazarus BioSystems
The Cradle
Hysteria
Corpse
Cadaver
Lazarus recovery/intake personnel

sections.Name: Yasuo Hikami
sections.Occupation: Arasaka special operative (Loyalist faction) / Mars Logan’s bodyguard
sections.Psychological Profile: A fiercely loyal Arasaka agent and Japanese nationalist. Sharp tongued but restrained.
sections.Physical Description: Fox exotic with large ears and silver trace marks across his face.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
ICE Layer - 1
Serpent Scales (custom integumentary implant, Combines the effects of Active Camo with Subermals) - 5
Netrunner Suite (Level 2) - 3
Monowire - 2
Kerenzikov (Combat wired reflexes) - 4
Kiroshi Oracles (Smart Eyes) - 2
Reactive Muscle Fibers - 1
Cyber Legs - 2
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Arasaka combat training in martial and marksmanship, comparable to elite level operatives
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Senkoh - High powered Tech SMG, set to enter market at the end of 2079
Heated Katana
Formal suit with light ballistics weave
sections.Backstory:
Born about the squalor and rampant crime of Japan’s infamous Chiba-11, Yasuo Hikami was destined for little more than the hails of gunfire and ramshackle burial caskets befitting a street urchin among many; he was, after all, the child of a linen-weave operator and a layabout, with few prospects for escape and the sole opportunities presented coming from street thugs and thieves.

Fortunately, young Yasuo was a dextrous hand and a quick mind–a deadly pair of assets ripe for corporate leverage and acquisition. A chance encounter with an Arasaka military transport drafting team–not unheard of, and often the start of fruitful recruits from the impoverished district–saw the boy conscripted into Arasaka’s domestic security forces at the age of 12 to sterling effect.

This was not an opportunity to be lightly undertaken. Yasuo shored himself, and, with determination, managed to make it through the grueling Hokkaido-based training regimen to go on and serve a stellar regimen within Arasaka’s infantry forces. His loyalty was unimpeachable, and resolve beyond sufficient–perfect material for leverage as an Arasaka special operative.

Deployed to effect worldwide, and now boasting an education from the prestigious Arasaka Academy franchise, Yasuo has served within the itinerary of such illustrious names as Somalian PM Raage Ugaas Ali in the 2060s and countless covert operations in-between. 

In 2077, Yasuo was volunteered for exotic conversion as part of a program to convert a small number of Arasaka agents into exotics to diversify possible covert operations and better supply niche upper-level client desires for operative detail. On April 24th, 2079, Yasuo was matched with the personal security detail requests provided by newly contracted Arasaka-backed pop-star Mars Logan and subsequently assigned as primary detail.
sections.Known Affiliations:
Arasaka: Special intelligence agent. Life long loyalty to the Arasaka family.
Mars Logan: Bodyguard
sections.Additional Notes: NPC is meant to be a quest giver and a point of contact for several characters with Arasaka hooks. Heavy cyberware is to keep the character in line with lore and backstory and in case of possibly using him as a mini-boss fight in future.
